title: Membeli Pakaian
opening: Selamat datang ke kedai kami. Ada apa-apa yang saya boleh bantu?

t1.prompt: Selamat datang ke kedai kami. Ada apa-apa yang saya boleh bantu?
t1.promptTranslation: Selamat datang (Welcome) to our shop. Is there anything I can help you with?

t2_what_item.prompt: Baik. Baju apa yang anda cari?
t2_what_item.promptTranslation: Baik (Okay). What kind of clothes are you looking for?

t3_ask_size.prompt: Saiz apa yang anda cari? Kami ada bilik persalinan di sana. Atau nak warna lain?
t3_ask_size.promptTranslation: Saiz apa (What size) are you looking for? We have a fitting room over there. Or would you like a different color?

t4_after_try_feedback.prompt: Bagaimana? Muat tak? Nak beli atau tidak?
t4_after_try_feedback.promptTranslation: Bagaimana (How is it)? Does it fit? Do you want to buy it or not?

t5_payment.prompt: Baik. Harganya RM 65.00. Anda nak bayar tunai atau kad?
t5_payment.promptTranslation: Baik (Okay). The price is RM 65.00. Do you want to pay cash or card?

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, saya tak faham. Boleh ulang?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Maaf (Sorry), I don't understand. Can you repeat?

t-end_goodbye_looking.prompt: Baiklah. Kalau ada apa-apa, beritahu saya ya. Terima kasih.
t-end_goodbye_looking.promptTranslation: Okay. If there's anything, let me know. Thank you.

t-end_goodbye_no_buy.prompt: Tidak mengapa. Terima kasih kerana datang. Sila datang lagi.
t-end_goodbye_no_buy.promptTranslation: It's okay. Thank you for coming. Please come again.

t-end_goodbye_buy.prompt: Terima kasih banyak! Sila datang lagi.
t-end_goodbye_buy.promptTranslation: Terima kasih banyak (Thank you very much)! Please come again.
